package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for append_then_trim_each_iteration: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Slice append followed by reslice each iteration instead of batching.
type CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationModel
}

type CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationService struct {
    repo *CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveAppendThenTrimEachIteration(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationDTO) error {
    focus := "append_then_trim_each_iteration"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var copied []CaseAppendThenTrimEachIterationDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive := map[string]int{"append": 1, "then": 2, "trim": 3, "each": 4, "iteration": 5}
    append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    append_positive_0 := append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_positive_0
    then_positive_1 := append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_positive_1
    trim_positive_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = trim_positive_2
    each_positive_3 := append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive["each"] + len(input)
    _ = each_positive_3
    for iteration_positive_4Index, item := range items { append_then_trim_each_iteration_positive[item.ID] = iteration_positive_4Index }
    return nil
}
